svg.text: Step-by-step process for requesting barangay documents online

text.tspan: • Open your browser and go to:
• Select your barangay from the dropdown
• You'll be directed to the verification
Option A – Link to Existing Record (Faster):
• Search with your first name, last name, and birthday
Option B – Submit New Details (For New Residents):
• Fill out complete personal information form
• Available list depends on barangay setup
• SMS ready alerts are Globe/TM only
Go to the "Home" tab to see your requests:
• View counts: Pending / In Progress / Ready
• Chat directly with the barangay secretary
about your request via the chat button 💬
Each request has a chat button:
• You'll receive an SMS to your

svg.text: 📲 DOWNLOAD THE APP ON YOUR PHONE
Install Smart Barangay Kiosk as an App — No App Store Needed!
Using Chrome browser on your phone:

text.tspan: 2. Tap the ⋮ (three dots menu) at the top-right corner of Chrome
3. Select "Add to Home screen" from the menu
4. Tap "Add" — the app icon will appear on your home screen! 🎉

svg.text: • Opens full-screen like a native app
• Quick access from your home screen

text.tspan: • Use the walk-in kiosk at the

svg.text: Smart Barangay Kiosk — Resident Remote Requests
For technical support, contact your barangay administrator
